2606.30362.title: ReactiveBFM: Reactive Closed-Loop Motion Planning Towards Universal Humanoid Whole-Body Control
2606.30362.paper_summary: While current Behavior Foundation Models (BFMs) provide robust control priors for humanoids, they only execute pre-defined reference motions. As a result, they are vulnerable to environmental shifts and incapable of reactive whole-body coordination. Naively cascading them with generative motion planners fails to achieve true reactivity, as inevitable tracking discrepancies induce fatal cumulative exposure bias. To bridge this gap, we propose ReactiveBFM, a real-time closed-loop planning-control framework. At its core, we effectively mitigate exposure bias via a scheduled prefix sampling curriculum, forcing the generative planner to actively learn error-recovery behaviors from imperfect physical states rather than ground-truth trajectories. Systematically, to reconcile the severe latency mismatch between auto-regressive planning and high-frequency tracking, we introduce an asynchronous replanning mechanism. Combined with trajectory chunking to temporally ensemble spatial references, our system guarantees spatio-temporally fluid execution without physical jitter. Deployed on the Unitree G1 humanoid, ReactiveBFM demonstrates unprecedented physical agility across a vast repertoire of text-conditioned closed-loop motions. Notably, ReactiveBFM achieves zero-shot moving target reaching, showcasing intricate whole-body coordination and on-the-fly replanning. In sim-to-sim benchmarking under severe perturbations, ReactiveBFM achieves a 93.1% success rate, significantly outperforming cascaded open-loop baselines by 28.6%.
2606.30362.paper_summary_zh: 目前的行為基礎模型（BFMs）為人形機器人提供了穩健的控制先驗，但它們僅執行預定義的參考動作。<lb/>因此，它們對環境變化非常脆弱，無法進行反應式的全身協調。<lb/>簡單地將它們與生成運動規劃器串聯起來無法實現真正的反應性，因為不可避免的跟蹤差異會引發致命的累積暴露偏差。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們提出了ReactiveBFM，一個實時閉環規劃控制框架。<lb/>在其核心，我們通過計劃的前綴取樣課程有效減輕了暴露偏差，迫使生成規劃器從不完美的物理狀態中主動學習錯誤恢復行為，而不是從真實軌跡中學習。<lb/>系統地，為了調和自回歸規劃與高頻跟蹤之間的嚴重延遲不匹配，我們引入了一種異步重新規劃機制。<lb/>結合軌跡分塊以時間上集合空間參考，我們的系統保證了時空流暢的執行，沒有物理抖動。<lb/>在Unitree G1人形機器人上部署的ReactiveBFM展示了前所未有的物理敏捷性，涵蓋了大量基於文本的閉環動作。<lb/>值得注意的是，ReactiveBFM實現了零樣本移動目標到達，展示了複雜的全身協調和即時重新規劃。<lb/>在嚴重擾動下的模擬對模擬基準測試中，ReactiveBFM達到了93.1%的成功率，顯著超越了串聯的開環基準，提升了28.6%。
2606.30362.author: Xiao Chen et.al.
2606.30362.authors: Xiao Chen, Weishuai Zeng, Xiaojie Niu, Zirui Wang, Jianan Li, Huayi Wang, Furui Xu, Jiahe Chen, Weixiang Zhong, Lihe Ding, Kailin Li, Jiangmiao Pang, Tai Wang, Tianfan Xue, Jingbo Wang
